description_long: This is a high-top sneaker, predominantly black with white accents, featuring a classic Converse All Star design. The shoe has a white rubber toe cap and sole, with visible black scuff marks and signs of wear along the midsole. The lateral side displays a circular Converse All Star logo patch in white, blue, and red, stitched onto the ankle area. White laces are threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the stitching is prominently visible in white thread along the seams. The interior lining appears to be a light beige fabric, and the heel features a branded rubber patch. The overall appearance suggests a durable, canvas-based construction suitable for urban environments.
description: A black high-top Converse sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and visible logo patch, showing signs of wear. The shoe features prominent white stitching and a classic urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Converse All Star logo patch, white laces, and visible stitching details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white rubber toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view without the logo patch, showing the smooth black canvas and stitching.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel seam, branded rubber patch, and the back of the collar.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the lateral ankle, white with blue star and red text; rectangular 'Converse All Star' rubber patch on the heel.
